name: claude-code-internals
description: Gives Claude source-level knowledge of its own architecture. 68 lessons covering every internal subsystem — hooks (all 27 event types), permissions (7-phase pipeline, 23 validators), boot sequence, agents, compaction, MCP, memory, AskUserQuestion tool, and binary-verified new features through v2.1.101 (proactive away summary, CLAUDE_CODE_CERT_STORE, dynamic loop pacing, cloud-first loops, /dream, Perforce mode, Script Caps).
